title: Performance complaints in Elden Ring

evidence.content: Even at the lowest encumbrance setting, your character's waddling movement is painfully slow, and their attacks are weighty and sluggish. On top of that the input lag is unbearable, and it is so easy for enemies to interrupt your attacks, knock you down, or stun you. If you fight an enemy that is di

I cannot for the life of me understand why anyone enjoys this game or other games like it.

Clunky combat, laggy input, enemies with aimbots, enemies who spam, terrible camera angles, enemies that can hit through unbreakable objects, etc. So many terrible gameplay mechanics. I know that comes with t

game is good apart from if you dont have a godly pc, since you will be running every other boss fight on 30 fps or lower just because they decide to make the arena cinematic when youre trying not to get butt touched instead of fighting the boss. talking of getting butt touched, draconic tree sentine
very slowww and anoying, graphics are ♥♥♥♥
